title: jurinea alpigena
intro: Jurinea alpigena, also known as Alpigenone Jurinea or White Dandelion, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. Jurinea alpigena is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Jurinea alpigena include infusions and decoctions, which are traditionally consumed to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other illnesses.
